label: Greek / Vol Surface
description: Crypto Greek surface visualisation; TradFi shows a skew-aware volatility grid per expiry and strike.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets.

0.3.note: availableOn: ['options']; singleton: false (can be added multiple times).

0.4.note: No any types or @ts-ignore in widget file.

0.5.note: Widget file has no lib/mocks/ imports; delegates to GreeksSurfacePanel/TradFiVolSurfacePanel which import from mocks internally.

0.6.note: options-data-context has no isLoading field; data is synchronous mock, never in a loading state.

0.7.note: GreeksSurfacePanel and TradFiVolSurfacePanel are collapsible components — always render trigger button even if surface data were empty.

0.8.note: Context throws if Provider missing (WidgetErrorBoundary handles); no async error path.

0.9.note: No dead code, no commented-out blocks.

l0.notes: 0.6/0.8 N/A — synchronous mock data, no async paths.

1.1.note: Widget reads isCrypto, asset, tradFiAsset exclusively via useOptionsData(). Panel sub-components re-derive surface data from mocks internally — panel-layer concern, widget file is clean.

1.2.note: options-data-context.tsx calls useGlobalScope() at line 130; globalScope.organizationIds used to build scopedWatchlists.

1.3.note: Org filter gates watchlist scope; organizationIds without 'odum' restricts to crypto-only watchlists; asset selection propagates accordingly.

1.4.note: clientIds not wired into options-data-context filtering — options context is asset/expiry-scoped.

1.5.note: Strategy filter not applicable to greek surface display.

1.6.note: Empty organizationIds returns all DEFAULT_WATCHLISTS (context line 275 condition).

1.7.note: Mock constants (generateVolSurface, SPOT_PRICES) live in panel sub-components — out of scope for widget cert. Widget file itself is clean.

l1.notes: Panel sub-components (vol-greeks-panels.tsx, tradfi-vol-surface-panel.tsx) import from mocks — tracked in knownIssues.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab + f9f29ea. Re-audit only if entitlements change.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live ✓ (real-time vol surface), paper ✓ (static surface for paper), batch ✓ (historical surface display, no interaction).

3.2.note: Context reads mode from useExecutionMode() at context line 129.

3.5.note: Paper mode: surface display identical to live; no order submission from this widget.

3.6.note: No WebSocket/interval in widget file; surface is computed synchronously from mock.

l3.notes: 3.3/3.4 require human verification (no interaction to disable in batch; visual batch indicator from layout).

4.1.note: No dead onClick in widget file; widget is purely read-only display.

l4.notes: 4.3/4.4/4.7/4.8 require human walkthrough (collapsible sections, hover tooltips on surface cells).

5.1.note: Target strategies: options-buying, options-selling, options-combo (vol surface informs strike selection and combo construction for all options strategies). Widget is informational — drives no selection.

l6.notes: L1.5 harness spec: 6 tests covering crypto/TradFi surface panel switching, asset prop propagation (BTC/ETH/SOL/QQQ). SVG/canvas skipped per task spec (3D chart). See tests/widgets/options/options-greek-surface.test.tsx

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex/rgb/hsl colors in widget file.

7.2.note: No mock data imports in widget file.

7.3.note: Widget file is 13 lines; well within limits.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.6.note: No security anti-patterns in widget file.

7.7.note: No hooks or deps in widget file; pure conditional render.

8.1.note: No text-[...] or fontSize= in widget file.

8.2.note: No arbitrary spacing tokens in widget file.

8.4.note: Agent grep: no accessibility violations in widget file. Human keyboard+screen-reader pass for panel sub-components required.

keepSeparate.rationale: Singleton:false — users can add multiple greek surface widgets to compare surfaces across assets. Merging with chain would destroy this flexibility.

relationships.notes: Read-only display widget; derives asset from OptionsDataContext (driven by control bar and watchlist selection).

dataContract.notes: Vol surface requires periodic refresh from venue API (Deribit greek surface endpoint for crypto; CBOE vol data for TradFi). Currently synchronous mock.

gaps: DeFi on-chain options not in scope
coverage.notes: Branches on isCrypto — crypto shows Greek surface (delta/gamma/vega/theta); TradFi shows vol skew grid.

knownIssues: Panel sub-components (vol-greeks-panels.tsx, tradfi-vol-surface-panel.tsx) import spot prices and surface generators directly from lib/mocks/fixtures — data should flow via options-data-context in a future refactor.

findings.description: vol-greeks-panels.tsx and tradfi-vol-surface-panel.tsx import generateVolSurface, SPOT_PRICES, ivToColor etc. directly from lib/mocks/fixtures/options-futures-mock instead of receiving them via context props. Widget file itself is clean; panel sub-component issue.
findings.deferReason: Panel sub-component refactor deferred to BP-5 data wiring phase.

findings.description: options-greek-surface-widget.tsx — 0 direct user-visible strings in widget file; strings live in panel sub-components
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21
